recipe.title: Minestrone soup
recipe.description: This hearty and nutritious minestrone soup is brilliant at embracing what you’ve got in your fridge. We make it every month and all the kids love it!

ingredients.name: large handfuls of seasonal greens
ingredients.note: such as savoy cabbage, curly kale, chard

ingredients.name: 400g tins of beans
ingredients.note: such as cannellini, butter, or mixed

ingredients.name: Parmesan cheese
ingredients.note: Grana Padano or vegetarian alternative, to serve

steps.descr: Peel and finely chop the garlic and onion
steps.instructions: Peel and finely chop the garlic and onion. Put a large shallow casserole pan on a medium-high heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil.

on_enter.say: Peel and finely chop the garlic and onion. Put a large shallow casserole pan on a medium-high heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil.

steps.descr: Add the garlic and the bay leaves, followed by the onions
steps.instructions: Add the garlic and the bay leaves, followed by the onions.

on_enter.say: Add the garlic and the bay leaves, followed by the onions.

steps.descr: Trim and chop the carrots and celery into rough 1cm...
steps.instructions: Trim and chop the carrots and celery into rough 1cm dice, adding to the pan as you go. Remove and finely chop any tough stalks from your greens and add to the pan. Cook for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring regularly, or until softened and caramelised.

on_enter.say: Trim and chop the carrots and celery into rough 1cm dice, adding to the pan as you go. Remove and finely chop any tough stalks from your greens and add to the pan. Cook for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring regularly, or until softened and caramelised.

steps.descr: Crumble in the stock cube, pour in the tinned tomatoes,...
steps.instructions: Crumble in the stock cube, pour in the tinned tomatoes, breaking them up with your spoon, then add 1 tin’s worth of water. Pour in the beans, juice and all, then add a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Crumble in the stock cube, pour in the tinned tomatoes, breaking them up with your spoon, then add 1 tin’s worth of water. Pour in the beans, juice and all, then add a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: Shred your greens and sprinkle into the pan, top up with...
steps.instructions: Shred your greens and sprinkle into the pan, top up with 600ml of boiling kettle water, then add the pasta. Cover and leave to simmer for 10 to 15 minutes, or until the pasta is just cooked and the soup has thickened to your liking.

on_enter.say: Shred your greens and sprinkle into the pan, top up with 600ml of boiling kettle water, then add the pasta. Cover and leave to simmer for 10 to 15 minutes, or until the pasta is just cooked and the soup has thickened to your liking.

steps.descr: Season the soup to perfection, then serve it with a...
steps.instructions: Season the soup to perfection, then serve it with a grating of Parmesan cheese and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.

on_enter.say: Season the soup to perfection, then serve it with a grating of Parmesan cheese and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.
